assigning a CCW_PRSCRBR_ID to represent an individual medical practitioner. This allowed PDE 
records that had the same prescriber but used a combination of different identifiers to be assigned the 
same identifier in the CCW files. 

From 2006–2013, the CCW_PRSCRBR_ID enabled linkage to the CCW prescriber characteristics file. For 
current years, the PRSCRBR_ID will link to the prescriber characteristics file. The CCW_PRSCRBR_ID 
was retired after 2013.
